channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: RAIDOU vs. Shin Megami Tensei V: Vengeance Special Live concert announced
item.content:encoded:
Live at YOKOHAMA Bay Hall on August 23.

ATLUS has announced the “RAIDOU vs. Shin Megami Tensei V: Vengeance Special Live” concert. It will be held at YOKOHAMA Bay Hall on August 23 at 16:00 JST, followed by a fan meeting event at 19:00 JST. A Taipei concert will follow in September. Ticket lottery applications are available now.

The concert will feature music from RAIDOU Remastered: The Mystery of the Soulless Army and Shin Megami Tensei V: Vengeance.

Musical performers include LaiD Back Devil’s Akira Iwata (bass / bandmaster), Toshiharu Okajima (drums), Hirotake Homma (guitar), Satoshi Oka (guitar), Gaku Tajima (keyboard), Hikari Kubota (keyboard), and Yuta Ishii (saxophone).

Presenters include MC Neki Matsuzawa (Chiaki Matsuzawa), guest Ryota Kozuka (ATLUS Sound Team), and others to be announced.

Watch a trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/raidou-vs-shin-megami-tensei-v-vengeance-special-live-concert-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: PLAYISM Game Show set for May 10
item.content:encoded:
News on 11 upcoming titles in celebration of PLAYISM's 15th anniversary.

PLAYISM will host a PLAYISM Game Show live stream on May 10 at 6:00 a.m. PT / 8:00 a.m. ET / 21:00 JST, the publisher announced. You will be able to watch it on YouTube.

The broadcast, which will celebrate PLAYISM’s 15th anniversary on May 11, will unveil new information on 11 upcoming titles published by PLAYISM, including titles being shown for the very first time.

Stay tuned.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/playism-game-show-set-for-may-10
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Free-to-play Unreal Engine 5-powered cinematic love adventure game Silent Whispers announced for PC, iOS, and Android
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Smartphone

A whisper away from a love that's real.

Publisher Archosaur Games and development subsidiary VVANNA STUDIO have announced Silent Whispers, a free-to-play cinematic love adventure game powered by Unreal Engine 5. It will be available for PC, iOS, and Android. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Archosaur Games and its official website:

About

Silent Whispers is a free-to-play Unreal Engine 5-powered cinematic love adventure where cinematic 4K visuals bring every heartbeat in the city to life, published by Archosaur Games.

As the boundary between illusion and reality begins to blur, you’re plunged into an endless game of survival. Step into the maze of light and shadow in an otherworldly city, and feel souls resonate in the space between heartbeats.

Freely explore a living, breathing city with him, go on unforgettable dates, and discover everyday miracles hidden in ordinary moments. But as you’re drawn into one dangerous “game” after another, caught between survival and betrayal… What choices will you make?

Characters

  • Alarik – He stands above all rules, the world’s laws written in the palm of his hand. At the pinnacle of power, he squanders eternity itself, and in his eyes, all living beings exist only to kneel.
  • Theron – He’s the shadow that walks the edge of order, the sharpest blade, and a prisoner of fate.
  • Valen – He blossoms in the deepest reaches of ice and snow, his innate purity untouched by the weight of fate.

World

  • City of Fading Light – Welcome to the City of Fading Light! Here, you’ll find all that is familiar: cafes steeped in the fragrance of roasted coffee; aerial stations harboring the hope of homebound journeys; a Ferris wheel burnished in gold by the setting sun… Yes. It’s just like any other city you know. There is no need to be afraid. As long as you can “survive” in this city, it can become a refuge for the lost, can it not?

Key Features

  • A Romance Bound by Fate – Some encounters are beyond even fate’s control.
  • Cinematic 4K Visuals – Powered by Unreal Engine 5 for breathtaking, pulse-raising realism.
  • Intimate First-Person Interactions – Every glance feels like a spark between souls.
  • Freeform Urban Exploration – Roam freely, discovering connections around every corner.
  • A Time Loop Narrative – Bet everything to secure a chance for the next you.

Watch the first trailers below.

World Premiere Trailer: A Whisper Away From a Love That’s Real

English

Japanese

First Reveal: Real-Time Gameplay Tech Demo

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/free-to-play-unreal-engine-5-powered-cinematic-love-adventure-game-silent-whispers-announced-for-pc-ios-and-android
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: G-MODE Archives+ Xenosaga: Pied Piper launches April 30 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch

Feature phone-exclusive Xenosaga game comes to modern hardware.

The G-MODE Archives+ release of Namco-developed game Xenosaga: Pied Piper will launch for Switch via Nintendo eShop and PC via Steam on April 30 in Japan for 1,800 yen, G-MODE Corporation announced.

Xenosaga: Pied Piper is an RPG that originally launched for feature phones on July 14, 2004 in Japan.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

A special investigations chief is on the trail of the ruthless killer known as “Voyager”.

What incident changed the fate of a once-human cyborg?

Key Features

  • Traditional JRPG with turn-based battles.
  • Gameplay follows a similar system to the mainline Xenosaga games, but adapted for mobile devices.
  • 2D overhead perspective, with a combination of conversations and cinematic cutscenes advancing the narrative.
  • Battles take place in a virtual space tied to the story.
  • The storyline was written by series creators Tetsuya Takahashi and Soraya Saga.
  • A port of a Japanese flip phone title (feature phones popular before smartphones).

(This release does not add elements such as languages and achievements that were not part of the original version.)

Series Overview

A port of the classic title originally released in 2006 for feature phones, part of Bandai Namco acclaimed JRPG series, Xenosaga.

A spin-off of the Xenosaga trilogy and part of the Xeno metaseries, the story follows the human life of cyborg Ziggy a key character in the Xenosaga trilogy—a century before the events of Xenosaga Episode I: Der Wille zur Macht.

Game Story

In this spin-off, Ziggy—who appeared in the main story as a cyborg—steps into the spotlight as the protagonist.

The story centers on events 100 years before the main story, when he was still human and served in the Federal Police under the name Jan Sauer in counterterrorism operations.

Can Jan and his special investigations unit stop the brutal killer codenamed Voyager before further chaos unfolds?



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/g-mode-archives-xenosaga-pied-piper-launches-april-30-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: TOKOYO: The Tower of Perpetuity developer announces side-scrolling action adventure game MELTMARE for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Help Lua escape a facility teeming with monsters.

//commentout, the one-man studio behind TOKOYO: The Tower of Perpetuity, has announced MELTMARE, a new side-scrolling action adventure game for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC (Steam). Development is currently around 45 percent complete. A demo will be playable at Tokyo Game Dungeon 12 on May 3.

Here is an overview of the game:

MELTMARE is an action adventure game in which you assist Lua, a heteromorphic girl on the other side of the screen, in escaping from a mysterious facility teeming with monsters. The player, somewhat reluctantly, ends up taking on the request to escort and guide the girl through the screen. As a strange condition of the request, the entire process must be live-streamed. The girl is trapped in a Western-style mansion. What truths await to be uncovered…?

Dialogue scenes are depicted with dramatic direction using Live2D and a desktop interface, along with an unpredictable scenario, while battle scenes utilize 2D pixel art action. All of this is streamed on a video-based social media platform, where viewers can share hints in the comments or send donations that can be used to upgrade equipment.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/tokoyo-the-tower-of-perpetuity-developer-announces-side-scrolling-action-adventure-game-meltmare-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
